HomePage.title: Web Developer
HomePage.intro: I'm Killian, a web developer passionate about creating innovative online experiences. Explore my portfolio to see how I merge technology and creativity.
HomePage.question: Do you have a project?

About.about_desc: With 5 years of experience in web development, I have worked on a variety of projects ranging from showcase sites to complex web applications. Learn more about my background and my passion for development.
About.highlight_exp: 5 years of full-stack web development experience
About.highlight_stack: Specialized in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript
About.highlight_degree: Master's in AI & Big Data — IPSSI Paris

Portfolio.unicancer_description: Project manager and web application developer in a team of about ten people, utilizing PHP/Symfony, JavaScript, and SQL technologies to design and implement innovative solutions.
Portfolio.univevry_description: Project manager in charge of redesigning an intranet tool for university students and staff, using PHP, Joomla, JavaScript, and MySQL technologies to enhance internal accessibility and efficiency.
Portfolio.ipssi_position: Master in AI, Big Data & Development
Portfolio.ipssi_description: Advanced training in artificial intelligence technologies, including Machine Learning and Deep Learning, and learning various frameworks such as Next.js, React.js, Django, and Flask, as well as DevOps technologies (Docker, Kubernetes). Defense and validation of an expert dissertation on artificial intelligence applied to language learning.
Portfolio.univevryschool_position: Professional Bachelor's Degree in Web & Mobile Development
Portfolio.univevryschool_description: Acquired foundational knowledge in DevOps technologies, computer networks, frameworks (Symfony, React.js), CMS (WordPress, Joomla), and mobile development technologies with Flutter.

Projects.pomodoro_desc: Pomodoro work technique including music, timer management, a to-do list, theme management, and work statistics.
Projects.socnet_desc: Reproduction of a fictional social network with management of relationships, posts, comments, likes, and account management.
Projects.hover_project: Hover over a project name to learn more.
Projects.youbotbuster_desc: SaaS tool using AI to automate the removal of spam comments under YouTube videos.
Projects.meetsponsors_desc: Creation of a 'For You' algorithm using AI to efficiently connect content creators with sponsors.
Projects.qovery_desc: AI-powered DevOps platform automating infrastructure management and deployments. Intelligent agents to provision, deploy and optimize cloud costs.
Projects.esport-calendar_desc: Application to automatically add esport events to your calendars. Automatic synchronization of competitions and tournaments.
Projects.qovery_fullDesc: AI-powered DevOps platform automating cloud infrastructure management and deployments. Development of intelligent AI agents capable of provisioning resources, deploying applications, monitoring performance and optimizing cloud costs in real time. Integration with major cloud providers and DevOps tools.
Projects.meetsponsors_fullDesc: Development of a personalized recommendation algorithm, inspired by social media "For You" feeds, using AI to efficiently connect content creators with relevant sponsors. The algorithm analyzes profiles, audiences and niches to suggest optimal matches between creators and brands, maximizing partnership relevance.
Projects.youbotbuster_fullDesc: SaaS tool using artificial intelligence to automatically detect and remove unwanted comments under YouTube videos. Integrates the YouTube API and an AI classification model to identify spam, bots and inappropriate content in real time. Available as a subscription via Stripe with a dedicated comment management dashboard.
Projects.socnet_fullDesc: Complete simulation of a modern social network featuring relationship management (friends, followers), posts, comments, likes and user account management. Built with Next.js and Firebase for authentication and real-time database. Full-stack project implementing key features of a social platform with a responsive TailwindCSS interface.
Projects.pomodoro_fullDesc: Complete web time management application based on the Pomodoro technique. Features a configurable timer with work sessions and breaks, a task list, a focus music library and detailed productivity statistics. Built with ReactJS and NodeJS, it offers multiple visual themes and comprehensive work session tracking.
Projects.esport-calendar_fullDesc: Web application allowing esport fans to automatically sync competitive events to their calendar (Google Calendar, iCal, Outlook). Real-time synchronization of tournaments, matches and competitions from major esport leagues worldwide. Built with Next.js, the app aggregates data from multiple sources to provide comprehensive and automated esport event tracking.

showcase.title: Showcase Websites
showcase.description: Showcase your business. Modern websites for restaurants, cafes, or shops, optimized for local visibility.

customapps.title: Custom Web Applications
customapps.description: Web tools designed for your business. Intuitive and efficient applications to meet your specific needs.

optimization.title: Optimization and Maintenance
optimization.description: Keep your site fast and secure. Audits, optimization, and maintenance for optimal performance.

consulting.title: Consulting and Support
consulting.description: Advance confidently in the digital world. Expert advice and tailored support for your projects.

Contact.text: Do you have a project in mind, an idea to develop, or a brand to launch? Let's talk! Contact me and let's see how I can help you.
